description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of an older man with gray hair and glasses in a gray shirt, captioned 'CHILD PORNOGRAPHY' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Newark' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: CHILD PORNOGRAPHY; Worst of the Worst; Newark; ICE
